description: The 'Ndrina Giacobbe is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Borgia, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Gaglianesi clan. After the death of boss Antonino Giacobbi, control passed to the Passafaro family, while the Pilò-Cossari remain criminal referents in the coastal area.
